overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban commercial district. The player moves along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing dynamic LED billboards, the color-changing 'Inside Cache' building, and various pedestrians while approaching a distant illuminated arch structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection beneath elevated highway

events.description: crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk and steps onto the concrete sidewalk
the Inside Cache building with geometric glass facade comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and proceeding along the sidewalk under the elevated transit structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane street
pedestrian with distinctive pink hair walking in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway or monorail track spanning overhead with support pillars
tall commercial building with horizontal yellow neon strips and large digital billboards displaying advertisements
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow and white striped markings
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection at night, with the camera crossing a wide crosswalk beneath an elevated highway structure. The scene is dominated by neon lighting from the commercial building on the left with yellow horizontal strips. As the camera moves onto the sidewalk, the Inside Cache building becomes visible ahead on the right, establishing the cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to the Inside Cache building with dynamic LED lighting

events.description: the Inside Cache building's LED facade shifts from green to vibrant pink
the building's neon panels transition from pink to warm yellow-orange

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians, with the color-changing Inside Cache building prominent on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a shiny purple jacket and shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk
blue sports car with glowing accents driving past on the street

entered.detail: modern commercial building with angular glass roof and large 'INSIDE CACHE' signage featuring dynamic color-changing LED panels
tall metal pole with horizontal LED light fixture illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered sidewalk, the camera passes by the striking Inside Cache building on the right, whose geometric glass facade cycles through vivid neon colors including green, pink, and yellow. The elevated highway continues overhead while pedestrians and futuristic vehicles move through the scene. The commercial building with yellow neon strips remains visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street transitioning past the Inside Cache building toward distant arch

events.description: passing the Inside Cache building as it recedes into the background, revealing a distant illuminated arch structure ahead
the Inside Cache building shifts to blue-cyan lighting as it moves to the background

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the colorful building recedes, approaching the distant illuminated arch while passing seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark pants walking ahead toward the arch
pedestrian sitting on a bench along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated archway or transit station entrance visible in the distance ahead with glowing structural elements
storefront with illuminated 'HIROSHI OPTICA' signage and display windows

segments.scene_description: Having passed the Inside Cache building, the camera continues along the palm-lined sidewalk as the colorful structure recedes into the background. A new landmark appears ahead in the form of a large illuminated arch structure. The Hiroshi Optica shop becomes visible on the right, and the crowd density remains moderate with pedestrians walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the illuminated arch structure at the end of the commercial strip

events.description: slight slowing of pace as approaching the arch structure area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated arch structure with fewer pedestrians around, maintaining steady pace along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead toward the arch structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching the large illuminated arch structure that dominates the end of the street. The Hiroshi Optica shop is passed on the right, and the elevated highway structure shifts to the left side of the frame. The crowd thins out as the camera continues toward the arch, with the persistent commercial building with yellow neon strips still visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from a dense urban intersection toward a distant illuminated arch. It begins by crossing a wide crosswalk beneath an elevated highway, guided by the yellow neon strips of a commercial building on the left. As the camera moves onto the sidewalk, the scene shifts to pass the geometric glass facade of the Inside Cache building, which cycles through vivid greens, pinks, and yellows while pedestrians and futuristic vehicles flow by. The perspective then expands along a palm-lined path as the colorful building recedes and the Hiroshi Optica shop appears on the right. Finally, the camera approaches the large illuminated arch that dominates the street, with the elevated highway shifting to the left as the crowd thins out.
